summary: Iteration 4 testing complete. Backend: 63/63 pytest passing (20 new iter4 + 13 iter3 + 11 iter2 + 19 iter1 regression). Frontend: MoodDietChart renders on Dashboard with correlations pills and ComposedChart (mood line + protein bar). Share page (/app/share) create/copy/revoke flows all work end-to-end with toast feedback. Public /share/{token} route loads without auth: summary scope hides diary; full scope renders shared-diary section; 404 + 410 (revoked) both show shared-error card with correct copy. Badges (Active/Expired/Revoked) all render correctly. No critical issues. One harmless ResponsiveContainer width warning on first paint (chart still renders after resize).

issues: Recharts emits ResponsiveContainer width(-1)/height(-1) warning on first paint (cosmetic — chart resizes correctly after). Optional: pre-size the container or use AspectRatio to silence.

critical_code_review_comments: server.py is now 1090 lines — past the 700-line guidance. Recommend splitting into routers (auth_router.py, diary_router.py, share_router.py, correlations_router.py, reports_router.py) for the next iteration.
`import secrets` is mid-file (line 964) instead of at the top. Move with other imports for readability and PEP8 compliance.
/api/correlations Pearson computation is correct; n<3 guard returns null as specified. Could be O(n) instead of three passes but irrelevant at days<=180.

/api/shared/{token} correctly excludes user_id and password_hash from owner doc, scopes diary_entries by scope='full' (last 7 days via `date: {$gte: week_ago}` with sort desc — good). diary_avg uses same window. No leakage.
ShareLinks.jsx buildShareUrl uses window.location.origin — correct for both preview and prod deployments. Copy fallback toasts on failure — good UX.
SharedView.jsx uses raw axios + REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL (no token interceptor) — correctly bypasses the api wrapper since this route is public. Good separation.
App.js routes /share/:token outside Private wrapper — confirmed working logged-out via fresh browser context.
Frontend gracefully handles 404/410 with shared-error card and message; revoked shows 'Link revoked', missing shows "This link doesn't exist." — both verified live.

success_rate.frontend: 100% — all critical share + correlations flows verified end-to-end

seed_data_creation: Created ~7 share-links (summary/full, various expirations) and one diary entry for today to exercise full-scope diary rendering. All link records are user-scoped; left in DB for next test agent to use.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iter 4 complete. Backend test_iteration4.py covers correlations bounds + share-link CRUD + public share view (404/410/revoked/expired via direct mongo backdate). Frontend verified live: mood-diet-chart with correlations-pills, share-root create+copy+revoke, shared-root public view for both scopes, shared-error card for 404 and 410. No retest needed unless new behavior added. Note server.py is now 1090 lines and should be split into routers next.
rca of the issue: N/A — no defects found in iteration 4.
